query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS nfeStaging (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  chaveNfe VARCHAR(44) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  numeroNf VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  serieNf VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  dataEmissao DATE NOT NULL,
  cnpjFaturado VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  cnpjFornecedor VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  postoFiscalId INT,
  produtoId INT,
  quantidade DECIMAL(12,3) NOT NULL,
  custoUnitario DECIMAL(10,4) NOT NULL,
  custoTotal DECIMAL(14,2) NOT NULL,
  statusAlocacao ENUM('pendente', 'parcialmente_alocado', 'totalmente_alocado') DEFAULT 'pendente' NOT NULL,
  quantidadeAlocada DECIMAL(12,3) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  observacoes TEXT,
  importadoEm TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX chaveNfe_idx (chaveNfe),
  INDEX statusAlocacao_idx (statusAlocacao),
  INDEX dataEmissao_idx (dataEmissao)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS alocacoesFisicas (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  nfeStagingId INT NOT NULL,
  postoDestinoId INT NOT NULL,
  tanqueDestinoId INT NOT NULL,
  volumeAlocado DECIMAL(12,3) NOT NULL,
  custoUnitarioAplicado DECIMAL(10,4),
  dataDescargaReal DATE,
  horaDescargaReal VARCHAR(5),
  nomeFornecedor VARCHAR(300),
  nomeProduto VARCHAR(200),
  tipoFrete VARCHAR(10),
  custoUnitarioProduto DECIMAL(12,4),
  custoUnitarioFrete DECIMAL(12,4),
  valorFrete DECIMAL(14,2),
  justificativa TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX nfeStagingId_idx (nfeStagingId),
  INDEX postoDestinoId_idx (postoDestinoId),
  INDEX dataDescargaReal_idx (dataDescargaReal)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS lotesFisicos (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  alocacaoFisicaId INT NOT NULL,
  postoId INT NOT NULL,
  tanqueId INT NOT NULL,
  produtoId INT,
  quantidade DECIMAL(12,3) NOT NULL,
  custoUnitario DECIMAL(10,4) NOT NULL,
  custoTotal DECIMAL(14,2) NOT NULL,
  dataDescarga DATE NOT NULL,
  statusCmv ENUM('pendente', 'calculado', 'recalculado') DEFAULT 'pendente' NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX alocacaoFisicaId_idx (alocacaoFisicaId),
  INDEX postoId_idx (postoId),
  INDEX statusCmv_idx (statusCmv)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS reordenacaoPEPS (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  alocacaoFisicaId INT NOT NULL,
  postoId INT NOT NULL,
  tanqueId INT NOT NULL,
  produtoId INT,
  dataReordenacao DATE NOT NULL,
  observacoes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX alocacaoFisicaId_idx (alocacaoFisicaId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS consumoLotesFisicos (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  vendaId INT NOT NULL,
  loteFisicoId INT NOT NULL,
  quantidadeConsumida DECIMAL(12,3) NOT NULL,
  custoUnitario DECIMAL(10,4) NOT NULL,
  custoTotalConsumido DECIMAL(14,2) NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX vendaId_idx (vendaId),
  INDEX loteFisicoId_idx (loteFisicoId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS auditoriaFuelEngine (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  operacao VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  alocacaoFisicaId INT,
  postoId INT,
  tanqueId INT,
  produtoId INT,
  detalhes JSON,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX operacao_idx (operacao),
  INDEX alocacaoFisicaId_idx (alocacaoFisicaId)
);

  INDEX alocacaoFisicaId_idx (alocacaoFisicaId),
  INDEX postoId_idx (postoId),
  INDEX statusCmv_idx (statusCmv)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS reordenacaoPEPS (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  alocacaoFisicaId INT NOT NULL,
  postoId INT NOT NULL,
  tanqueId INT NOT NULL,
  produtoId INT,
  dataReordenacao DATE NOT NULL,
  observacoes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS consumoLotesFisicos (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  vendaId INT NOT NULL,
  loteFisicoId INT NOT NULL,
  quantidadeConsumida DECIMAL(12,3) NOT NULL,
  custoUnitario DECIMAL(10,4) NOT NULL,
  custoTotalConsumido DECIMAL(14,2) NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX vendaId_idx (vendaId),
  INDEX loteFisicoId_idx (loteFisicoId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS auditoriaFuelEngine (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
